notes: German specialty ingredients giant with a comprehensive UV protection portfolio under the SymSol® and SymShield® brands. Symrise combines UV filter expertise with encapsulation technology to deliver photostable, high-performance sun care solutions. Their innovative UV filter and antioxidant combination systems provide comprehensive photoprotection, and their strong R&D capabilities position them at the forefront of next-generation UV filter development.
